kept.text:
BREAKING $PLTR| $230 PT| Outperform Rating 🚀

Wedbush's analyst @DivesTech reiterated Outperform rating and maintains $230 Price Target on @PalantirTech.

Palantir is reporting its FY1Q26 results on Monday May 4th after the bell where we expect to see another robust quarter driven by the expanding use-cases for the company’s AIP as demand accelerates across both government and commercial for its offerings with PLTR being at the forefront of the AI Revolution. 

We continue to believe Palantir has the potential to be a trillion-dollar market cap company in the next few years as the AI Revolution takes hold and the company sees accelerating demand for its AI products and services. We maintain our Outperform rating and $230 price target with the company remaining on the Ives AI 30 list.

We believe the Street’s top-line estimate of $1.54 billion as beatable with US commercial revenue expected to accelerate beyond the 139% y/y seen in the last quarter as AIP continues to be at the center of delivering value to customers with the Street still underestimating the company’s commercial efforts. PLTR continues to see unprecedented demand for AIP based on our recent checks in the field across both commercial and government landscapes by taking AI solutions that solve meaningful problems across organizations at enterprise scale driving new customer conversions and existing deal expansions. 

When speaking more with prospective customers, the majority discussed how they heard about Palantir’s technology and the value these technologies were able to provide through word of mouth after other partners went all in on Palantir, but many were shocked after seeing the use cases through demos giving us more confidence that many still don’t fully understand the full value that Karp & Co. bring to the table. We also note that the company’s bottom-line expectation of $870 million - $874 million for FY1Q26 are hittable despite aggressive investments into product pipeline, elite technical hiring, and AIP with the company accelerating its Rule of 40 profile beyond 127% seen in the prior quarter."

kept.text:
$PLTR Baird reiterates Palantir stock Outperform rating ahead of earnings 🦾🔥

2026-04-29
Baird reiterated an Outperform rating and $200.00 price target on Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) shares ahead of the company’s first-quarter earnings report. 💥

The firm expects Palantir to deliver strong first-quarter results when it reports on Monday, May 4. Revenue growth is likely to accelerate for the 11th consecutive quarter, Baird said. The company posted impressive 56% revenue growth over the last twelve months, reaching $4.48 billion in total revenue. 📈

The firm anticipates upside in both US Commercial and US Government segments. Baird projects $5.76 billion in free cash flow for 2027, with a reasonable upside case of $7.5 billion. 🦾

The firm believes 2026 and 2027 estimates will continue to move higher. Baird views the stock’s recent digestion period as a good opportunity to purchase the growth asset... 🐂

In other recent news, Palantir Technologies Inc. secured a significant $300 million contract with the U.S. Department of Agriculture. This Blanket Purchase Agreement is intended to support the National Farm Security Action Plan and modernize service delivery to American farmers. The initiative, known as "One Farmer, One File," aims to streamline access to USDA services and improve operational efficiency. 🚜

Additionally, the Federal Aviation Administration has chosen Palantir, alongside Thales SA and Air Space Intelligence Inc., to develop a new AI tool for air traffic management, as part of a broader effort to modernize the nation’s air traffic control system. ✈️

On the financial front, Rosenblatt has reiterated its buy rating for Palantir, citing strong AI growth momentum. The firm maintains a $200 price target and anticipates strong earnings results from Palantir’s upcoming report on May 4. These developments highlight Palantir’s ongoing expansion in both government contracts and AI-driven solutions. 🎯
🇺🇸🌐🦾🐂📈🔮🔥
https://t.co/PT9alpTlLV

kept.text:
$PLTR 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸

“ seeking Alpha”

Now, Palantir is rapidly approaching its Q1 2026 earnings update that is expected to see the light on May 4th before the market opens. I'm not suggesting that the stock's valuation has fully reflected the new risk factors and the Anthropic (ANTHRO) threat - there might be more downside to come, for sure - but from what I see, PLTR looks like a strong pick on this prolonged dip right before earnings because the underlying business momentum is unlikely to have stalled yet. I believe management will provide several positive commentaries, and PLTR will, once again in its corporate history, report a massive Rule of 40, outshining most other tech firms out there. The risk/reward looks favorable ahead of the earnings print, so I decided to upgrade my rating to "Buy" for the first time since mid-2024.

$NVDA X $PLTR Nvidia debuts Nemotron 3 Nano Omni for multimodal AI efficiency 👀⬇️

April 29, 2026
Nvidia has announced the launch of Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, an open multimodal AI model designed to unify vision, audio and language processing within a single system.

The model aims to address the current limitations faced by agentic systems, which typically use separate models for different modalities, causing increased latency and fragmented context during AI operations.

Companies including Applied Scientific Intelligence, Aible, Foxconn, Eka Care, H Company, Palantir and Pyler have already begun integrating Nemotron 3 Nano Omni into their solutions... 
🍿🦾🔮🔥🐂

tweet.text:
パラ友各位

おはようございます。
決算も近づいてきました。
$PLTR を強気にまとめてみます。

お時間ある方はご一読下さい🐕
$PLTR #palantir #パランティア #米国株

まず、ポイントは「単なるAIブーム銘柄ではなく、政府・軍・大企業の“AI運用インフラ”としての地位を急速に固めてる」という点ね。

特に重要なのは、株価が年初来で果てしなく下落してる一方で、事業面ではむしろ大型契約や導入拡大が加速してること。

つまり、マーケット的には冷え冷えなのに業績は熱々に強くなってる。
ということは、「もし決算が想定以上なら株価の反応が大きくなるのではないか」とか考えてる😏

で、転換点は前回のQ4決算。

▷売上は前年比70%増の14.1億ドル
▷大型契約数が急増
▷米国商用部門が137%成長
▷既存顧客の利用拡大も加速
▷利益率も非常に高水準

特に注目したいのは、「Rule of 40」127%。

これは一般的なソフトウェア企業で40%以上なら優秀とされる指標。
127%は異次元。

さらに $PLTR 側はFY2026売上見通しを71.8〜72.0億ドルと提示し、マーケットの予想を10億ドル以上も上回ってる。
これはKarpを始めとする経営陣がかなり強気の成長を見込んでるってこと。

さらに言うと、その後も大型案件が連続。

▷米国国土安全保障省（DHS）10億ドル規模の契約
▷米国農務省（USDA）の3億ドル契約
▷軍事AIシステム「Maven」の拡大
▷ $NVDA との主権AIインフラ連携
▷Stellantis N.V.との契約拡大
▷GE AerospaceとのAI活用拡大

その中でも特に重要視したいのはMaven。
これは米軍向けAI戦場システムで、現在は事実上、戦場データ統合と意思決定支援の中核に近い存在。さらに米国防総省は関連予算を大幅に増額するって報道出てるし、 $PLTR が国家安全保障インフラに深く入り込んでいってる。

で、絶対伝えたいのは「Anthropic問題」。
もともとMavenでは、Anthropic PBC のClaudeがLLM層として使われてたのよ。でも、政府がAnthropicとの協力を停止したことで、「 $PLTR はAnthropic依存だから終わった」とか、熊さんたちが言い出した🐻

まあ実際のとこ $PLTR は短期間で他モデルへ切り替えを実施し、システムは継続稼働。

ここが非常に重要。重要。

これどういうことかって言うと、 $PLTR の価値は特定AIモデルそのものじゃなくて、

▷データ統合
▷アクセス制御
▷機密ネットワーク対応
▷現場運用
▷AIと人間の意思決定接続

を担う基盤部分にある、ってこと。

要するにLLMは交換可能で、その上に乗る“OS”のような役割を $PLTR が担ってるってこと。

なので「Claudeが使えなくなったら終わり」とかいう浅はかな主張は $PLTR を理解できてない。
実際、モデル切り替え後もMavenは継続運用されてるし、その後は国防総省側の正式プログラム化と予算拡大が進んだ。
これを「モデル非依存性が実戦レベルで証明された」ことを示してる。

$PLTR はいつも決算で証明してきてる。
マーケットは次も神決算を求めてる。

ポイントは、
▷売上がどこまで市場予想を超えるか
▷米国商用成長率が高水準を維持できるか
▷通期ガイダンスが再び引き上げられるか

まとめると $PLTR は単なるソフトウェア企業じゃなくて、国家・軍・大企業向けのAI運用基盤になりつつある。で、特定LLMに依存しない構造が実戦レベルで証明され始めてる。もしこの流れが続けば、市場の評価基準そのものが大きく変わる可能性がある。
つまりは地球を支配する企業になるかもね😏

Major defense names have given back a meaningful chunk of gains, but the underlying environment hasn’t really weakened.

$LMT -1.2% 🔴 (26% off ATH)
$RTX -1.0% 🔴 (19% off ATH)

• Defense budget trajectory is still pointing toward ~$1.5T range into 2027

•Good time to look into a defensive position at these levels.
